name: jp4-docs
description: VitePress documentation site for jp4 — a native Java client library for P4Runtime. Built and deployed to GitHub Pages. Not a publishable npm package; node tooling lives here only to build the static site.

scripts.docs:javadoc: ./gradlew javadoc && mkdir -p docs/public/api/javadoc && cp -r build/docs/javadoc/. docs/public/api/javadoc/
